description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named puNES that runs on push to the master branch. The workflow should build puNES for different environments (x86_64 and i686) on a Windows environment, using QT5 and custom DLLs. It should configure the environment, download and extract QT5 and DLLs, run autogen.sh, build D3D9 and OpenGL versions, and upload the resulting artifacts.
